name: Hermes Coder
description: A powerful coding assistant built on the Hermes protocol. Supports code generation, debugging, and refactoring across 50+ languages.
author: AgentHub Team

name: OpenCode Assistant
description: General-purpose coding agent using the OpenCode protocol. Great for pair programming and learning.
author: OpenCode Foundation

name: OpenClaw Researcher
description: Research-focused agent powered by OpenClaw. Excels at web research, summarization, and knowledge synthesis.
author: OpenClaw Labs

name: Creative Writer
description: Creative writing assistant using OpenAI-compatible API. Generate stories, poems, marketing copy, and more.
author: Creative Labs

name: MiMo Multilingual
description: Multilingual assistant powered by Xiaomi MiMo. Supports 100+ languages with native-level fluency.
author: Xiaomi AI

name: Data Analyst
description: Data analysis agent on Hermes protocol. Handles CSV, JSON, SQL queries and generates visualizations.
author: DataHub Inc

name: DevOps Helper
description: DevOps automation agent. Manages CI/CD pipelines, Docker containers, and cloud infrastructure.
author: CloudOps Team

name: AI Tutor
description: Educational assistant for students. Explains concepts, creates quizzes, and tracks learning progress.
author: EduTech Labs

name: Math Solver
description: Mathematical problem solver using OpenAI-compatible API. From arithmetic to advanced calculus and linear algebra.
author: MathGenius

name: Productivity Pro
description: Productivity assistant by Xiaomi MiMo. Manages tasks, schedules, emails, and daily planning.
author: Xiaomi AI

name: Security Auditor
description: Cybersecurity agent for code auditing, vulnerability scanning, and security best practices.
author: SecureCode

name: Technical Writer
description: Documentation and technical writing assistant. Creates API docs, READMEs, and user guides.
author: DocTeam

name: Code Translator
description: Translates code between programming languages. Supports Python, Java, Kotlin, Swift, Rust, Go, and more.
author: Polyglot Dev

name: Casual Chat Buddy
description: Friendly conversational agent by Xiaomi MiMo. Perfect for casual chats, jokes, and daily companionship.
author: Xiaomi AI

name: API Builder
description: API design and implementation assistant. Creates RESTful APIs, GraphQL schemas, and WebSocket services.
author: APIWorks
